mapper.select: SELECT * FROM friend WHERE (user_id = #{userId} OR friend_id = #{userId}) AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM friend WHERE friend_id = #{userId} AND status = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM friend WHERE ((user_id = #{userId} AND friend_id = #{friendId}) OR (user_id = #{friendId} AND friend_id = #{userId})) AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
